g.text: A = ln(∑t⁻ᵈ) + S_pmi + ε − P_sup − P_con + H

svg.text: combined = norm(bm25)*w_bm25 + norm(splade)*w_splade + norm(graph)*w_graph + act_r*w_actr + norm(ce)*w_ce
Intent-classified | Dream-learned PMI | Supersession/conflict penalties | Per-query normalization | Selective CE reranking | Zero LLM at query time
